posts.author: SpicyKebab (Z)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do I query items_by_column_values by two different column/value pairs?

Hello @CSG @CXS @monday-team,

I was wondering if this ability was ever added since the main topic was closed in 2019.

Is there a way for us to use GraphQL to query two columns of the same group on the same board with specified values?

What is the supported/preferred method of accomplishing this?

Thank you!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SpicyKebab, welcome to our community!

Ahh I’m afraid that at this time, there currently is no way to query multiple columns and/or multiple column values using the items_by_column_values method.

This is something our developers are working on though. Hopefully this feature will be released before the end of year, but it’s not set in stone.

Thank you for your patience~

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SpicyKebab,

Just to update, we do not support the ability to filter by multiple column values in a single column. We haven’t released the ability to filter by multiple columns just yet, but wanted to give you an update!

Here is my recent announcement with more info: [RELEASED] Items by Multiple Column Values Query.

Thanks!
